g.text: Examine the cipher note pinned to the do...
Search the building for another way in.
Find the old clockkeeper and ask for hel...
Follow the clue to hunt for the hidden k...
Try the loose grate the note mentions.
Shoulder the stiff side door open.
Climb up to the high window.
Unlock the front door with the brass key...
Head inside with what you have learned.
Climb up to the great clockface.
Take the cipher wheel up to the clockfac...
Stay and read the fascinating logbooks.
Cross carefully and grab the oil can.
Decide the ledge is too risky and back o...
Take the service ladder up to the clockf...
Set the hands using the cipher.
Search for a back panel behind the face.
Spin the hands at random and hope.
Free the jammed gears with the oil can.
Give up; the gears will not move.
Open the panel into the vault.
Slip into the clockmaker's hidden worksh...
Decode the final message and bring it to...
Keep the clockmaker's secret among frien...
Stuff the treasure in your bag and run.
